cashier.title: Cashier service unavailable
cashier.message: The cashier service is temporarily unreachable. Payments cannot be processed right now.
cashier.alternative: You can retry in a moment or use a manual backup process.
cashier.suggestion3: Contact support if the problem persists.

emergencyAccess.title: Emergency access check failed
emergencyAccess.message: We could not verify your emergency-access rights.
emergencyAccess.autoRetryExhausted: Automatic retries exhausted. Please retry manually.
emergencyAccess.suggestion3: Request break-glass access if this is an emergency.

pharmacyDDI.title: Drug interaction check unavailable
pharmacyDDI.message: The drug-drug interaction (DDI) service is unreachable.
pharmacyDDI.alternative: You can retry or request a supervised override.
pharmacyDDI.suggestion3: Request an override from a pharmacist if urgent.

roleAssignment.title: Role assignment failed
roleAssignment.message: Your user role could not be determined.
roleAssignment.alternative: Sign out and back in, or contact your administrator.
roleAssignment.suggestion1: Sign out and sign in again.
roleAssignment.suggestion3: Contact your administrator for role reassignment.

shiftOverlap.title: Shift overlap detected
shiftOverlap.message: Your shift assignment overlaps with another scheduled shift.
shiftOverlap.alternative: Verify your shift calendar or request an override.
shiftOverlap.suggestion2: Ask your scheduler to resolve the overlap.

warehouse.title: Warehouse service unavailable
warehouse.message: The inventory warehouse is temporarily unreachable.
warehouse.alternative: Retry shortly or use an offline stock sheet.
warehouse.suggestion3: Use a paper backup if critical.
